scope_summary.problem: 48 xfail conformance tests remain. Breakdown: 5 verifier (kwargs arg count mismatch in codegen), 30 output mismatch, 6 other, 3 parse. → requirements.md
scope_summary.success_criteria: Reduce xfail count. Priority: kwargs verifier errors first (depth), then output mismatches. Runtime must match CPython 3.12 output exactly. → pre_clarifications.md

boundary.in_scope: kwargs codegen fix (cranelift mod.rs + jit.rs symbol registration + builtins.rs kwargs functions), output mismatch fixes in builtins.rs/string_ops.rs, parser edge case fixes
boundary.out_of_scope: GC root scanning integration (separate future work), generator frame-switching migration, new stdlib module implementations
boundary.constraints: Must not break existing 101 passing conformance tests. All changes go through JIT pipeline (parse→typecheck→HIR→MIR→cranelift→execute).
